steps.title: Locate the y-intercept
steps.content: The y-intercept is the point where the graph crosses the y-axis, which occurs at $x = 0$. To find it, trace the vertical line $x = 0$ until it meets the graph and read off the y-coordinate.

steps.title: Read the value from the figure
steps.content: From the figure, the graph passes through $(0, -4)$ on the y-axis. That matches choice B — B is correct.
